infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: TSN needs location to send accurate emergency alerts.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: TSN needs microphone to record your voice identity note.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: TSN needs photo library access to update your profile photo.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: TSN needs camera to take your profile photo.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: TSN needs location for emergency alerts.

plugins.photosPermission: TSN needs photo library to update your profile picture.
plugins.cameraPermission: TSN needs camera to take your profile photo.

plugins.microphonePermission: TSN needs microphone to record your voice ID.
